$comment: char VALUE codegen across all targets (D-CSUBSET-CHAR-STRING-VALUE-CODEGEN + D-CSUBSET-CHAR-INT-WIDENING): byte load (movzx/LDURB), byte store (mov r/m8/STURB, baseline pipeline), char->int SExt (movsx/SXTB, sign-correct), int->char Trunc. 65 + 66 + 1 = 132; a zero-extend regression of the SExt drops it to 131. All offset-0 / local-scalar access (no indexed pointer arithmetic), so it runs on every target including arm64 whose lea has only the symbol form. The optimizedPipelines arm proves the value flow survives Mem2Reg (char locals promoted out of their byte stack slots).
